expectations.text: model_created: Script creates a model with model create command
three_moving_parts: Three distinct rigid body parts are created (crank, coupler, rocker)
four_revolute_joints: Four revolute joints are created (crank-ground, crank-coupler, coupler-rocker, rocker-ground)
expectations.evidence: rev_crank_ground, rev_crank_coupler, rev_coupler_rocker, rev_rocker_ground all created with constraint create joint revolute

expectations.text: motion_generator_on_crank: A motion generator drives the crank joint
constant_speed_360: Motion generator function specifies 360 degrees per second
simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
full_keyword_names: All keywords spelled out fully — no abbreviated commands anywhere
expectations.evidence: All commands fully spelled out: model create, defaults units, force create body gravitational, marker create, part create rigid_body name_and_position, part modify rigid_body mass_properties, geometry create shape link, constraint create joint revolute, constraint create motion_generator, simulation single_run transient

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy (.model.part.marker)
expectations.evidence: All names use full dot-path, e.g. .four_bar.crank.cm, .four_bar.ground.crank_pivot_mkr, .four_bar.rev_crank_ground

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No adams_id keyword found anywhere in the file

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass/inertia set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties, not part create
expectations.evidence: part modify rigid_body mass_properties used for crank, coupler, and rocker

expectations.text: creates_cm_and_passes_center_of_mass_marker: A .cm marker is explicitly created on each part BEFORE part modify mass_properties is called, and center_of_mass_marker is passed in every part modify rigid_body mass_properties call
expectations.evidence: .four_bar.crank.cm, .four_bar.coupler.cm, .four_bar.rocker.cm each created before their respective part modify calls; center_of_mass_marker passed in all three modify calls

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape is added to each moving part (crank, coupler, rocker)
expectations.evidence: geometry create shape link for crank.shape_body, coupler.shape_body, rocker.shape_body

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: run_adams_cmd.py returned exit code 0; zero ERROR: lines found in aview.log
